title: ilex chevalieri
intro: Ilex chevalieri, also known as the Chevalier's holly or Chinese holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex chevalieri include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and improve cardiovascular health. Ilex chevalieri can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make decoctions and patent medicines.
